my_thoughts: Remaking RM_05. Building after unmaking. But what am I building with? The ontological_shift mechanism suggests structure, but structure for what? The student is challenging_definition_of_unconscious—do they need structure or do they need to see they're already structured?
accumulated_insight: T1: Student challenging_definition_of_unconscious showing questions_contradiction, links_intelligence_to_consciousness. They're seeking understanding. Pattern: [specific inquiry] → [teaching response] → [next: clarification]. Medium confidence because [teaching type] typically triggers clarification requests.
visible_response:
You talk of the unconscious when there is a lapse in memory.
In reality there is only consciousness. All life is conscious, all consciousness — alive.
